summary: PRODUCTION UX FORENSIC AUDIT - Main Intelligence Surfaces. Ruthless scoring against 2026 cognition-platform expectations. 6 routes audited: /advisor, /revenue, /operations, /market, /risk, /compliance. MAJOR SOURCE CLARITY MISMATCH CONFIRMED: Top alert source is native_email/thread_silence but UI wording implies CRM-originated revenue signals.

issues: Top alert shows 'Response Delay for Zanda Health - 70.5 hours' with source 'native_email/thread_silence' but categorized under 'Compliance & Governance' — confusing mental model
Greeting uses h1-like styling but no semantic h1 element (accessibility issue)
31 of 57 buttons (54%) fail WCAG 44px touch target minimum
No explicit 'Why this tab?' explainability on advisor page (exists in code but not visible)
5 cognition tabs (Money, Revenue, Operations, People, Market) lack clear source badges
Instability indices (RVI 60%, EDS 50%, CDR 55%, ADS 20%) lack inline explanations

scoring_rationale.cognitive_load: 76 cards/panels is VERY high. Information overload. 5 tabs with nested content creates cognitive fragmentation.
scoring_rationale.source_clarity: Source confusion: Alert labeled 'Compliance & Governance' but source is 'native_email/thread_silence'. User cannot trust signal origin.
scoring_rationale.actionability: 'Acting on this' and 'Acknowledged' buttons are clear CTAs. Recommended actions are specific.
scoring_rationale.repetitive_blocks: Many identical card patterns. Risk cards, metric cards all look the same. Hard to scan quickly.
scoring_rationale.proactive_intelligence: Good: 3 RISKS REQUIRING ATTENTION, AI-Ranked Priority Action. But lacks time-bound urgency.
scoring_rationale.workflow_automation: 'Auto-Email', 'Quick-SMS' buttons exist but are not wired to real automation.
scoring_rationale.feedback_control: No explicit 'Was this helpful?' or feedback loops visible.
scoring_rationale.mental_model_fit: MAJOR ISSUE: Alert from email silence shown under 'Compliance & Governance' breaks user expectation.
scoring_rationale.accessibility: 54% buttons under 44px. Missing semantic h1. Color contrast relies on #64748B which is borderline.

issues: Sync progress bar shows 30% but page already showing KPIs — confusing state
Connection badges say 'Last synced 11 Mar' but current date is 14 Mar — 3-day stale data not flagged
4 tabs but no visual indicator of which tab has urgent alerts
'Cross-Domain Intelligence' tab is empty for this user (no propagation chains shown)
21 of 31 buttons (68%) fail 44px touch target

scoring_rationale.cognitive_load: 35 cards is manageable. 4 clear tabs provide good structure.
scoring_rationale.source_clarity: GOOD: HubSpot and Xero badges with sync timestamps. Best source clarity of all pages.
scoring_rationale.actionability: Owner Plan (Revenue operations owner, By end of this week) is specific and accountable.
scoring_rationale.repetitive_blocks: Deal cards and KPI cards use consistent patterns.
scoring_rationale.proactive_intelligence: Scenario modeling (Best/Base/Worst case) is proactive but not enough urgency signals.
scoring_rationale.workflow_automation: No 'Send follow-up' or automated workflow buttons.
scoring_rationale.feedback_control: No way to flag incorrect deal data.
scoring_rationale.mental_model_fit: Good: Pipeline, Scenarios, Concentration tabs match SMB founder mental model.
scoring_rationale.accessibility: 68% buttons fail touch targets. Mono font at 10px for labels is hard to read.

issues: Page shows 'Verifying connected systems...' indefinitely during audit — slow backend
KPI labels (SLA Breaches, Task Aging) are operations-specific but lack context
No clear separation between CRM-sourced ops data vs Accounting-sourced ops data
Cross-Domain Bottlenecks section is empty
'Connect Accounting' button present even when accounting is connected

scoring_rationale.cognitive_load: Similar to Revenue. 35 cards, clear structure.
scoring_rationale.source_clarity: Connected badges present but no per-KPI source attribution.
scoring_rationale.actionability: Owner Plan exists but checkpoint is generic.
scoring_rationale.proactive_intelligence: Bottleneck detection concept is good but currently empty.
scoring_rationale.feedback_control: No way to dismiss false bottleneck alerts.
scoring_rationale.mental_model_fit: Operations vs Delivery distinction unclear for SMB founders.

issues: No h1 semantic heading — only styled status banner
No explainability strip (WHY YOU ARE SEEING THIS) — exists in other pages but not Market
No action ownership card — exists in Revenue/Operations/Risk but not Market
5 tabs but Saturation/Demand/Friction tabs require calibration to show data
'Forensic Reports' moved to Governance section — confusing navigation
Loading skeleton shows for extended period

scoring_rationale.cognitive_load: 5 tabs with mostly empty content creates cognitive uncertainty.
scoring_rationale.source_clarity: POOR: No source badges. 'Market signals' could be from anywhere.
scoring_rationale.actionability: 'Execute in Chat' buttons exist but not all moves have clear actions.
scoring_rationale.repetitive_blocks: Marketing Gaps section repeats channel cards.
scoring_rationale.proactive_intelligence: 'What To Focus On Next' section is good proactive intelligence.
scoring_rationale.workflow_automation: 'Execute in Chat' is semi-automated but not true automation.
scoring_rationale.feedback_control: No way to flag irrelevant market moves.
scoring_rationale.mental_model_fit: Market vs Marketing vs Positioning terminology is confusing.
scoring_rationale.accessibility: 22 of 32 buttons (69%) fail touch targets. No h1.

issues: 46 cards/panels is the highest cognitive load of all pages
3 tabs but Workforce Intelligence tab requires email connection for any data
'Cross-Domain Risk' tab shows 'Composite Risk: Insufficient data' — not clear why
Acronym legend (RVI, EDS, CDR, ADS) requires click to expand — should be inline
Risk Propagation chains are empty for this user
24 of 34 buttons (71%) fail touch targets — worst accessibility

scoring_rationale.cognitive_load: 46 cards is overwhelming. Too much information density.
scoring_rationale.source_clarity: Per-category 'Insufficient data' labels help but inconsistent.
scoring_rationale.actionability: Risk Response Owner Plan with specific checkpoint is good.
scoring_rationale.repetitive_blocks: Risk category cards all look identical.
scoring_rationale.feedback_control: 'What do RVI, EDS, CDR, ADS mean?' toggle is good.
scoring_rationale.mental_model_fit: 3 tabs with different risk framings can confuse.
scoring_rationale.accessibility: 71% button accessibility failures. Worst of all pages.

issues: No explainability strip — inconsistent with Revenue/Operations/Risk
No action ownership card — inconsistent with other intelligence pages
No tabs — single flat page unlike all other intelligence pages
Empty state shows 'Connect accounting and email' but user has both connected
Strategic Alignment section duplicates Risk page content
SPOFs (Single Points of Failure) section unclear what constitutes a SPOF

scoring_rationale.cognitive_load: 29 cards is manageable but flat structure lacks hierarchy.
scoring_rationale.source_clarity: POOR: No source badges. 'Regulatory Items' could come from anywhere.
scoring_rationale.actionability: No clear next actions. Just displays compliance status.
scoring_rationale.repetitive_blocks: Card patterns consistent but content feels duplicated from Risk.
scoring_rationale.proactive_intelligence: SPOF detection is reactive, not proactive.
scoring_rationale.feedback_control: No way to acknowledge or dismiss compliance items.
scoring_rationale.mental_model_fit: Compliance vs Risk vs Governance overlap is confusing.

source_clarity_mismatch.description: Production data shows top alert source as 'native_email/thread_silence' but UI labels it as 'Compliance & Governance'. User cannot trust signal attribution.
source_clarity_mismatch.remediation: Add explicit source badge per alert (e.g., 'Source: Outlook Email Thread Analysis')

button_accessibility.description: 54-71% of buttons across all pages fail WCAG 2.1 44px minimum touch target. Average: 65%
button_accessibility.remediation: Increase min-h-[44px] and min-w-[44px] on all button components

inconsistent_explainability.description: Explainability strip (WHY YOU ARE SEEING THIS) exists on Revenue/Operations/Risk but NOT on Advisor/Market/Compliance
inconsistent_explainability.remediation: Add InsightExplainabilityStrip component to Advisor, Market, and Compliance pages

inconsistent_action_ownership.description: Action Ownership Card exists on Revenue/Operations/Risk but NOT on Advisor/Market/Compliance
inconsistent_action_ownership.remediation: Add ActionOwnershipCard component to Advisor, Market, and Compliance pages

cognitive_load_variance.description: Card count ranges from 26 (Advisor) to 76 (Advisor with full data) to 46 (Risk). No consistent information architecture.
cognitive_load_variance.remediation: Establish maximum card density guideline (e.g., max 20 cards per viewport)

missing_semantic_h1.description: Advisor and Market pages lack semantic h1 element. Styled greeting/banner is not accessible.
missing_semantic_h1.remediation: Add visually-hidden h1 or convert greeting to proper h1 element

empty_state_inconsistency.description: Compliance page shows 'Connect accounting and email' even when user has both connected. Empty state logic incorrect.
empty_state_inconsistency.remediation: Fix hasAccounting and hasEmail detection in CompliancePage.js

action_items.issue: Source Clarity Mismatch - Alerts labeled 'Compliance & Governance' but sourced from email thread analysis
action_items.fix: Add explicit source badge to each alert card showing actual data source (e.g., 'Source: Outlook Thread Analysis')

action_items.issue: Button Accessibility - 65% average buttons fail 44px touch target
action_items.fix: Update ActionBtn, button classes to min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] across all components
Add InsightExplainabilityStrip component to AdvisorWatchtower.js, MarketPage.js, CompliancePage.js

action_items.issue: Missing Action Ownership Card on Advisor/Market/Compliance
action_items.fix: Add ActionOwnershipCard component to AdvisorWatchtower.js, MarketPage.js, CompliancePage.js

action_items.issue: Missing semantic h1 on Advisor and Market pages
action_items.fix: Add proper h1 element or visually-hidden h1 for screen readers

action_items.issue: Cognitive load variance - 26-76 cards per page
action_items.fix: Establish max 20 cards per viewport guideline, use progressive disclosure
Fix hasAccounting/hasEmail detection logic in CompliancePage.js
Add inline full-name labels or persistent legend above indices

ui_bugs.issue: min-h-[44px] not applied - buttons are 40px height
Not rendered on Advisor page despite component import

issues: 76 cards creates information overload
Instability indices lack inline explanations
Source mismatch between label and actual source
Flat structure unlike tabbed siblings
Empty state logic broken
Content overlaps with Risk page

context_for_next_testing_agent: UX forensic audit complete. 6 intelligence routes audited with ruthless scoring. Overall platform score 4.74/10 (Grade C-) against 2026 cognition-platform benchmark of 7.5. CRITICAL: Source clarity mismatch confirmed - alerts labeled 'Compliance & Governance' but sourced from 'native_email/thread_silence'. Button accessibility is 65% failure rate. Explainability strips and Action Ownership cards missing on 3 of 6 pages.
